[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001010 4
1 10110001 4
2 10000011 3
3 10111000 4
4 10100011 4
5 00010000 1
6 11001010 4
7 00110000 2

01 10 10100001 3
12 21 10000000 1
23 32 10001010 3
34 43 00100000 1
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 10001000 2
67 76 00010000 1 match 5
70 07 00010001 2

02 20 10010000 2
13 31 10100000 2
24 42 00010000 1 match 5
35 53 11001010 4 match 0 6
46 64 00110000 2 match 7
57 75 00000010 1
60 06 10110000 3
71 17 00000001 1

03 30 10100000 2
14 41 00100001 2
25 52 10001010 3
36 63 10101000 3
47 74 00010001 2
50 05 10000000 1
61 16 10100000 2
72 27 00010110 3

15 51 10000000 1

37 73 00000010 1
